# Microsoft Detours - Vendored Dependency

**Version**: v4.0.1 (pinned)
**Commit**: `4b8c659f549b0ab21cf649377c7a84eb708f5e68`
**Repository**: https://github.com/microsoft/Detours

## Setup

Clone Detours into this directory:

```bash
git clone https://github.com/microsoft/Detours.git .
git checkout 4b8c659f549b0ab21cf649377c7a84eb708f5e68
```

The CMakeLists.txt expects `src/detours.h` and source files inside `src/`.
